subcodes.first_line: The Pen testifieth in the Most Great Prison and proclaimeth amongst the nations: "The Kingdom is God's, the Sovereign of eternity," yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد القلم فی السجن الاعظم و یدعو بین الامم الملک لله مالک القدم ولکن الناس
subcodes.subjects: @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
